title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
description: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
description: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
description: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
description: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
description: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
description: The AI-powered audiobook generation won't bind authors to an exclusive contract, meaning they are free to publish their generated audiobooks anywhere.

title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
description: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
description: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
description: One of the most promising introductions at Google’s I/O developer conference on Tuesday was a new way for consumers to use the web: AI agents. Unfortunately, it was also the most confusing.

title: With aluminum prices up 20%, recycling startups bet on AI to cash in
description: Recycling startups are using AI to improve the recovery of critical minerals like aluminum, aiming to build a massive source of the metal.

title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
description: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

title: Anthropic says it’s about to have its first profitable quarter
description: Anthropic has told its investors that it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter.

title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
description: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

title: xAI burned $6.4B last year — SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
description: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

title: Nvidia posts another record quarter, reveals $43B of holdings in startups
description: Nvidia announced another record revenue figure after market close on Wednesday, but forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.

title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators — now it’s buying $2.8B more
description: Elon Musk's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.

title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
description: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.

title: OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time
description: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946 — and this time, the mathematicians who exposed its last embarrassing claim are backing it up.

title: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, looks to become the AI desktop buddy you never knew you needed
description: Initially billed as an "AI butler," Iris watches what happens on a user's desktop and automatically learns how to do tasks for them, its co-founder says.

title: OpenAI barrels toward IPO that may happen in September
description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership, and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.
